results.title: Align Technology AI Adoption Tracker | Larridin | AI Initiative Tracker
highlights:
Align Technology has positioned itself as a leader in digital dentistry, leveraging artificial intelligence and advanced technologies to revolutionize orthodontic treatment[1]. The company's AI-powered initiatives span the entire treatment workflow, from the recently launched ClinCheck® Live Plan that generates doctor-ready treatment plans in 15 minutes to the sophisticated iTero Lumina scanner with Multi-Direct Capture technology[2]. Built on data from over 21 million Invisalign patients, Align's AI applications include automated treatment planning, remote monitoring through Invisalign Virtual Care AI, and diagnostic tools like Align X-ray Insights[3]. The company continues to strengthen its AI capabilities through strategic acquisitions like dentalXrai GmbH in 2022 and has amassed an impressive patent portfolio of over 3,100 patents globally, with more than 72% active[4].
...
## AI Hiring Signals
...

...

### Tech vs Non-Tech AI Requirements

...
Align Technology shows limited AI skills requirements across the organization, with only 3.8% of job postings mentioning AI. Surprisingly, non-tech roles (3.7%) nearly match tech roles (4.2%) in AI mentions, suggesting some organizational awareness but limited strategic AI workforce development.
...

...

...
Jr. Software Engineer Engineering/Tech
...
Sr. Software Engineer in Test Engineering/Tech
...
Software Engineer in Test Engineering/Tech
...
AI-powered automated treatment planning that generates doctor-ready initial Invisalign treatment plans
...
Reduces treatment planning cycle from days to minutes (approximately 15 minutes), built on proprietary data and algorithms from decades of R&D and 21 million patient treatments. Enables doctors to review and approve cases while patients are still in the office.
...
Features 3x wider field of capture in a 50% smaller wand, 2x faster scanning, and photorealistic 3D models that eliminate need for intraoral photos. Includes advanced AI for superior visualization and diagnostic capabilities.
...
AI computer-aided detection software for analyzing 2D radiographs
...
Uses artificial intelligence to automatically analyze radiographs for caries, periapical radiolucencies, and periodontal bone loss. 95% of early users found it helpful for communicating patient oral health conditions, with 91% reporting improved patient trust and treatment acceptance.
...
How does Align Technology use AI in
...
Align uses AI through ClinCheck Live Plan to automatically generate doctor-ready treatment plans in 15 minutes, leveraging data from over 21 million patient treatments and proprietary algorithms to optimize tooth movement predictions.
...
The iTero Lumina scanner features AI-powered Multi-Direct Capture technology for 2x faster scanning, photorealistic 3D model generation that eliminates need for intraoral photos, and integration with AI diagnostic tools like NIRI technology for caries detection.
...
## In Application
...
| Application | Vendor | Use Case |
| --- | --- | --- |
| Machine Learning Models | Proprietary/Internal | Predictive AI for treatment outcomes, automated tooth segmentation, and treatment planning optimization using data from 21+ million cases |
| Computer Vision | Proprietary/Internal | Automated cephalometric point recognition, tooth segmentation from 3D files, and photorealistic scan generation for clinical assessment |
| Deep Learning Algorithms | Proprietary/Internal | Treatment outcome prediction, aligner damage prediction, and automated assessment for remote monitoring |
| MindBridge AI Platform | MindBridge AI | Internal audit processes and financial anomaly detection for risk management and compliance |

# Align Technology Machine Learning Engineer interview questions & guide 2026
...
### What is a Machine Learning Engineer at Align Technology?
...
As a **Machine Learning Engineer** at **Align Technology**, you are at the intersection of advanced digital dentistry, computer vision, and high-scale data processing. You will be instrumental in developing the algorithms that power the **Invisalign** system and the **iTero** intraoral scanning platform. Your work directly influences patient outcomes by automating complex clinical workflows and enhancing the precision of 3D modeling and treatment planning.
...
This role is both technically demanding and mission-critical. You will work on massive, proprietary datasets, requiring a deep understanding of how to bridge the gap between research-grade models and production-ready software. You will face challenges involving **imagery analytics**, **optics**, and **large-scale infrastructure**, making this a prime opportunity for engineers who thrive when solving high-complexity problems that have a tangible, real-world impact on healthcare.
...
The work at Align Technology is highly specialized. Expect to demonstrate not just your coding ability, but your capacity to apply machine learning to physical, geometric, and optical constraints.
...
These questions assess your foundational knowledge of **Machine Learning** principles and your ability to apply them to domain-specific problems like **imagery** and **optics**.
...
These questions test your ability to build scalable, resilient systems that integrate **ML** models into broader software ecosystems.
...
**Role-related knowledge

...
algorithms and your knowledge of the **Python** ecosystem.
...
As a **Machine Learning Engineer**, your primary responsibility is to transform high-level research objectives into functional, scalable software. You will spend significant time optimizing pipelines for data ingestion, ensuring that the **ML** models you build are performant under production loads.
...
You will collaborate closely with research teams to iterate on models and with software engineers to integrate these models into the **Align Technology** software suite. Your day-to-
...
will involve debugging, performance tuning, and
...
that your code meets

high reliability standards required
...
healthcare-adjacent technology.
...
A competitive candidate for this role possesses a blend of strong software engineering fundamentals and specialized **Machine Learning** experience.
...
* **Must-have skills**: Proficient in **Python**, experience with **Spark**, **Docker**, and **Kubernetes**. A solid grasp of **ML** lifecycle management.
...
* **Nice-to-have skills**: Experience with **Ray**, knowledge of computer vision, 3D geometry, or optical physics.
...
The **Machine Learning Engineer** position at **Align Technology** offers a unique opportunity to apply cutting-edge technology to a field that directly improves patient lives. Success in this role requires a disciplined approach to both your technical fundamentals and your ability to communicate complex solutions.

Mechanical Engineering PhD expected summer 2023. Minor in Technology Innovation (Georgia Tech TI:GER Program); Passed Series 65 Exam. Familiar with programming in Python including building machine learning models with PyTorch. Proficient with 3D modeling and analysis tools such as Solidworks, ABAQUS, and LS-DYNA as well as mathematical tools such as MATLAB and Mathematica. Also familiar with several experimental methods including DMA, DSC, AFM, nanoindentation, FTIR, Raman spectroscopy, and XRD. Strong interpersonal, communication, and leadership skills. In my free time, you can probably find me running through Atlanta (usually Piedmont Park), reading, or playing guitar. results.title: Align Technology Data Analyst Interview Questions 2026
highlights:
Align Technology Data Analyst Interview Questions 2026
...
Align Technology Data Analyst Interview Questions 2026
...
Align TechnologyData Analyst
...
# Align Technology Data Analyst interview questions & guide 2026
...
### What is a Data Analyst at Align Technology?
...
As a **Data Analyst** at **Align Technology**, you sit at the intersection of complex medical technology and global business operations. Your primary mandate is to transform vast amounts of data—ranging from manufacturing efficiency to clinical outcomes and customer engagement—into actionable insights that drive the company’s strategic direction. You are not merely reporting numbers; you are the bridge between raw data and the high-level decision-making that powers the **Invisalign** system and the broader **Align** digital platform.
...
This role is critical to the company’s mission of transforming smiles and changing lives. You will be expected to influence stakeholders across product, operations, and marketing, ensuring that data-backed narratives guide our growth. Success in this role requires a blend of technical proficiency, strong business acumen, and the ability to articulate complex findings to non-technical audiences. You will navigate high-stakes environments where your analysis directly impacts operational excellence and global market expansion.
...
### Key Responsibilities
...
As a **Data Analyst** at **Align Technology**, your daily work will revolve around maintaining and evolving the analytical infrastructure that supports our global teams. You will be responsible for extracting data from various sources, cleaning and transforming it, and building visualizations that provide visibility into key business metrics.
...
### Role Requirements & Qualifications
...
* **Must-have skills**: Proficiency in SQL is essential. You must also have strong experience with data visualization tools (such as Tableau, PowerBI, or similar) and a solid grasp of statistical analysis.
...
* **Nice-to-have skills**: Experience with cloud data platforms (like AWS or Azure) and familiarity with scripting languages like Python or R for data manipulation.
...
* **Experience level**: A proven track record in a business-facing analyst role is highly valued. You should be able to point to specific projects where your analysis led to a tangible business outcome.
...
The **Data Analyst** role at **Align Technology** is a unique opportunity to apply your technical expertise to a business that is fundamentally changing the healthcare landscape. By focusing your preparation on business logic, clear communication, and structured problem-solving, you will be well-positioned to succeed.
...
## Other roles at Align Technology

results.title: Senior AI Engineer - 3Shape
highlights:
Senior AI Engineer - 3Shape
...
# Senior AI Engineer
...
Join one of the most exciting Danish tech companies in the medical device industry and make an impact. With us you will be able to work on solutions used by thousands of dental professionals worldwide. We are currently looking for an ambitious Senior AI Engineer to join our team in Poland.
...
As a Senior AI Engineer, you’ll join an agile team of AI experts spearheading AI adoption within our After Sales division — building production-grade AI solutions that support thousands of internal users and customers globally.
...
Key responsibilities:
...
Lead AI Integration: Work closely with business stakeholders to understand real business problems, assess where AI can create measurable impact, and decide which use cases are worth pursuing.
...
Design & Deploy Agents: Build and productionize complex multi-modal agents with deep systems & tool integration, LLM reasoning, and robust testing/evaluation loops.
...
Own solutions end-to-end: Take full ownership from concept to production, including architecture, implementation, testing, deployment, and production performance.
...
Set engineering standards: Contribute to the testing, evals, deployment patterns, agent design, and software engineering practices that the AI team will build on.
...
Provide technical leadership: Lead small, high-impact teams when a use case requires it, mentor more junior engineers, and help raise the technical bar of the team.
...
Your profile:
...
· 5+ years building production software, with at least the last year or two shipping AI / Agentic systems users actually rely on.
...
· Strong Python (FastAPI or similar). Code other engineers want to maintain.
...
· Real experience with modern agent frameworks, tool and system integration, and LLM evaluation — beyond prompt engineering.
...
· You live AI in your daily work and have informed opinions about it. Claude / Codex / Cursor power user.
...
Nice to have
...
· Experience with ElevenLabs, Azure AI, Databricks, or Palantir.
...
· Front-end chops (TypeScript / React) for building agent UIs and internal tools.
...
· Cloud / DevOps fluency: containers, CI/CD, logging and metrics.
...
· C# / .NET for integrating with parts of our existing stack.

results.title: Scientific Lead, Generative AI Engineer, Applied Intelligence for Discovery job with Eli Lilly and Company | 3055061
highlights:
Scientific Lead, Generative AI Engineer, Applied Intelligence for Discovery job with Eli Lilly and Company | 3055061
...
# Scientific Lead, Generative AI Engineer, Applied Intelligence for Discovery
...
Employer Eli Lilly and Company Location San Francisco, California Start date Jun 15, 2026
...
## Job Details
...
We are building something unprecedented, an AI foundation that will fundamentally change how drug discovery research is conducted.
...
The Applied Intelligence for Discovery (AI4D) team is a newly formed group within Lilly Research Laboratories that operates at the intersection of scientific delivery and core platform development. AI4D’s mission is to connecting scientists to petabyte-scale data through natural language interfaces, automated analysis workflows, and intelligent search — and to convert early deployments into repeatable system standards and evaluation practices that scale across therapeutic areas.
...
As a Generative AI Engineer, you will design, build, and operate the core AI systems that power this transformation: retrieval-augmented generation over internal scientific documents, text-to-SQL over complex omics databases, agentic workflows that automate multi-step analyses, and the evaluation infrastructure that able the next-generation of medicines for patients.
...
Key Responsibilities
...
Design, build, and optimize RAG pipelines over internal publications, study reports, electronic lab notebooks, and other scientific documents
...
Build hybrid retrieval systems combining vector search with structured metadata, knowledge graphs, and ontology-aware filtering
...
Build and optimize text-to-SQL systems over Lilly’s databases, enabling scientists to query gene expression, proteomics, pathway, and variant data through natural language
...
Develop schema documentation, semantic annotations, and gold-standard question/SQL pairs that bridge how scientists think about data and how it is stored
...
Implement multi-step reasoning approaches (chain-of-thought, self-correction, Reflexion loops) to improve accuracy on complex scientific queries
...
Design agentic AI workflows that chain database queries, bioinformatics tools, literature search, and visualization into automated multi-step scientific analyses
...
Evaluate and integrate emerging orchestration frameworks (LangGraph, CrewAI, custom architectures) for scientific use cases
...
Build evaluation frameworks measuring accuracy, reliability, and scientific validity of AI outputs
...
PhD in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field with 0-3+ years of experience; or equivalent experience building production LLM systems; MS in Computer Science, Data Science, or a related technical field with 5+ years of experience; or equivalent experience building production LLM systems
...
Experience building LLM-powered applications, including at least two of: RAG systems, text-to-SQL, agentic workflows, or fine-tuning pipelines
...
Strong software engineering skills in Python with experience building production-grade systems
...
Deep familiarity with the modern LLM ecosystem: embedding models, vector databases, and orchestration frameworks
...
Experience designing evaluation frameworks for LLM systems — systematic approaches to measuring accuracy, detecting hallucinations, and tracking regressions
...
Comfort working with complex, heterogeneous data — databases with hundreds of tables, specialized schemas, or domain-specific vocabularies
...
Familiarity with biomedical data types (omics, clinical, molecular) or scientific databases
...
Experience with MLOps/LLMOps tooling: experiment tracking, model registries, prompt versioning, A/B testing for AI systems
...
Knowledge of biomedical ontologies (Gene Ontology, MeSH, ChEBI) or experience integrating domain-specific knowledge into LLM systems
...
$181,500 - $283,800
